response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience, with recent, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work — a required skill that is rare to find. His deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) fits the quality bar of the role. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience, a frontend history weighted toward Ember.js over React, and no Kotlin — but his demonstrated polyglot range (TypeScript, Java, C++, D, PHP, Swift) suggests these are learnable rather than blocking.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work and cloud/container deployment (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
Current AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — directly matches a required skill
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test libraries, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for this role
Frontend depth historically in Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
No Kotlin and only older Java experience for the secondary backend stack; Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and limited React/Kotlin depth
